title: UPI OC No 169 A FY 2024 25 Addendum to Enhancement in UPI LITE Limits
text:
NPCHUPI/OC No. 169 A/2024-25
To,
All UPI Members

Dear Sir/Madam,

Nee)

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

27 February 2025

Subject: Addendum to Enhancement in UPI LITE Limits

With reference to the NPCI/UPI/OC No. 138/2021-22, dated 16 March 2022 and NPCI/UPI/OC No.
169/2023-24, dated 31% August 2023, UPI LITE was introduced and transaction limit was increased from
%200 from %500 respectively.

14. As per the latest notification issued by RBI on 4" December 2024 vide circular no. RBI/2021-22/146

CO.DPSS.POLC.No.$1264/02-14-003/2021-2022 with subject ‘Framework for Facilitating Small
Value Digital Payments in Offline Mode’, for UPI LITE, the enhanced limits shall be %1,000 per
transaction with 25,000 being the total limit. Replenishment of used limit shall be allowed only in online
mode with AFA. Customer will further have the option to set Auto Top-up for limit replenishment as
per NPCI circular, ‘introduction of Auto Top-up on UPI LITE’, vide No. NPCI/UPI/OC No. 205/2024-
25, dated 27" August 2024. The details of the LITE limits are as below:

UPI LITE | UPILITE X (Offline) |
| eo el | Existing | New No Change
| Per Transaction Limit 500 | 1000 [ %500
| Total Limit at any point in time | 2000 | 5000 L 2000

The new limits shall apply to and govern all existing NPCi circulars pertaining to UPI LITE limit
(Annexure A). All the members are required to make the necessary changes pertaining to limit

increase immediately.

Issuer banks live on UPI LITE shall identify all the UPI LITE accounts that have had Zero transactions
in the past six months. Any balances in these dormant LITE accounts shall be refunded to the source
bank account. Issuer banks shall implement the changes by 30" June 2025.

Yours sincerely,
SD/-

Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Product

10014, The Capital, B Wing, 10 Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051-
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
contact@npci.org.in www.npci.org.in

CIN: U74990MH2008NPL189067


Neel

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

Annexure A

NPCI circular, ‘Introduction of “On-Device wallet” — UPI LITE for Small Value Transactions’ vide No.
NPCI/UPI/OC No. 138/2021-22, dated 16" March 2022

NPCI circular, ‘Enhancement in UPI LITE transaction limit to %500' vide No. NPCI/UPI/OC
No.169/2023-24, dated 31% August 2023

. NPCl circular, ‘Customer awareness and engagement for UPI LITE Enablement and Top-up’ vide No.
NPCI/UPI/OC No.179/2023-24, dated 02" November 2023

. NPCI circular, ‘Introduction of UP! TAP & PAY mode of Payments’ vide No. NPCI/UPI/OC
No.186/2023-24, dated 19" December 2023

_ NPCI circular, ‘Introduction of Auto Top-up on UPI LITE’ vide No. NPCI/UPI/OC No.205/2024-25,
dated 27" August 2024
